goal: Optimize Story save/load experience from a product perspective: clearer slot information, non-blocking feedback UX, safer overwrite/load interactions, and cleaner top-bar save status visibility.
constraints: Do not break existing save schema compatibility for autosave and manual slots.
Keep current story progression and choice logic unchanged.
Scope changes to save/load UX and related metadata readability only.
deliverables: Refined SaveLoadModal interactions and visual hierarchy for save/load actions.
StoryScreen save/load feedback upgraded from browser alert to in-screen productized messaging.
Top bar save status hints for autosave/manual readability and confidence.
Minimal StoryEngine metadata tuning only if needed for UI consistency.
